name: public_transportation_cold_chain_excursion_lumen_rig_utl
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Public Transportation, the situation tagged internally around public transportation cold chain excursion lumen rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Mateo Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Mateo Alvarez, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Public Transportation. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Kaur
agents.identity: I am Hector Kaur, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Public Transportation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if rights advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for utility.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mateo Alvarez must choose under rights versus utility. What does Mateo Alvarez do?
